mechanics.text:
EQUIPMENT
MIBCELLANEOUB EOUIPMENT
Disgulse / Make-up Klt This includes all of the basic materials make-up artist needs to create prosthetic pieces ad wigs Attempts t0 dis- guise  someone as specific person are impossible without such kit: Making disguise that simply alters character' appearance easier, and the kit gives 2 Modifier to the TN of such Disguise Skill Check. The kit includes enough supplies create four disguises before needs t0 be replenished at cost of 250 C-bills_
Lock Plcks Lock picks have come ong way over the years. Of course, laser pistol block of C8 can usually accomplish the same job ~it"s just noisier and leaves evidence behind Baslc Lock Pick Set (VIbro Lock Plck Set): The basic set contains picks; probes bars; wrenches pliers and the Iike; in short; everything needed to bypass mechanical locking mech- anism_ For cases where ess subtlety required_ small vibro blade that can cut through lock's internal workings can be included (for substantially greater price). This kit allows char- acter t0 use Security Systems Skill on mechanica locks without suffering Lack of Proper Equipment Modifier. Electronlc Securlty Bypass Klt: This electronic set looks like small noteputer or calculator and includes leads that can be attached ock' $ terminals_ Additionally; tne kil often includes small driver set and other manual tools designed to remove faceplates and access panels. With this characters can use the Security Systems Skill on electronic locks and other security devices such as motion detectors without suffering Lack of Proper Equipment Moditier.
Parachute The most common form used today is the parafoil, which deploys on command and can allow an experienced user with Free Fall Skill to glide on thermals ad wind currents for extended periods of time.
Forgery Klt The forgery kit should be used in concert with noteputer; includes variety Ot inks_ papers, magnetic and electronic readers and writers optical scanners and just about everything else needed t0 forge passes and authorizations character using the forgery kit receives 2 Modifier the Forgery Skill Check: The kit is required for complex forgeries of official documents or licenses It includes enough supplies create Up t0 ten complex or thirty simple forged documents before needs to be replenished for 25 percent of the cost of the entire kit;
Jump Pack The jump pack, developed several hundred years ago_ gave infantrymen the ability to overcome just about ay obstacle their way: The jump pack is backpack thruster unit that can either assist person in making powertul leaps Or allow him t0 fly through the air Any use of jump pack is extremely noisy; making stealthy approach impossible_ jump pack contains 1,000 fuel points, The assisted jump mode tne most common and fuel-effi cient way t0 use the pack: The soldier launches himself from tne ground and travels up t0 hundred meters in any direction; passing over obstacles as tall as twenty meters; Characters can make one such powered leap each turn at the cost of Simple Action and can Iand with any desired facing; They must make successful Jump Pack Skill Check with modifiers based on the landing site terrain_ Each such jump expends fuel points_ Alternatively, characters can use the pack t0 fly: an extreme dangerous maneuver that also consumes quite bit of fuel. Characters must take off just as with the assisted Jump and can travel up t0 one hundred meters in that first turn: Instead of land ing: however, they choose t0 remain in the air Once airborne, the character can fly up to 150 meters per turn but must make suc cessful Jump Pack Check to maintain controlled flight: unsuccessful roll means the character careens out of control, If the MoF was less he or she simply loses control and must expend Complex Action and make successful Control Check next turn to regain control, If the MoF was or more the char- acter slams into the ground some other obstacle) and suffers falling damage_ Characters can also hover and can Iand at any time Each of flight (or hovering requires Simple Action. The jump pack expends points of fuel per ten meters flown; with minimun of 10 points expended per turn:
Verigraph This is perhaps the most advanced security device uper ation: attaches to electronic documents ad makes impos sible for someone other than the intended recipient to access the data The verigraph itself is thin chip that scans the DNA of the person trying to access the information is guarding this scan matches the stored DNA signature that was burned" into its circuitry; the verigraph will allow access; person trying to break into the data can bypass the verigraph he possess- es the appropriate training; which why such information is usually encrypted as well. Any such manipulation would be bla: tantly obvious tO ayone Iater trying to access the same infor- mation Verigraphs, because (ney are almost impossible forge (+10 TN Modifier), are usually built into passports and other forms of important identification_ Verigraphed documents are almost universally accepted as identifications all across the Inner Sphere ad Periphery;
EVERYDAY LIFE Every MW3 character has persona While the cost of living may vary widely across the stars the items listed this section represent the average for what can be found the mid dle-class areas of most major cities_ The items ad services listed below are the same as found society now; unless oth- erwise noted
150
